description: Align /prd output docs to .oh/tasks/<feature-name>/prd.md and add a probe blocking stale flat PRD paths.

userStories.title: Canonicalize the /prd output location
userStories.description: As a harness operator, I want the PRD skill to document one canonical output path so downstream /ralph and /ship-spec stages can reliably find task artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: The job step says to save to .oh/tasks/<feature-name>/prd.md.
Existing output/checklist language remains aligned with .oh/tasks/<feature-name>/prd.md.
Mirrored Pi skill content resolves to the same canonical path when present.
userStories.notes: Implemented by updating the provider-facing PRD skill contract.

userStories.title: Guard against stale flat PRD paths
userStories.description: As a future maintainer, I want a deterministic eval probe to fail if the stale flat PRD path returns.
acceptanceCriteria: The probe fails on .oh/tasks/prd-[feature-name].md in provider-facing PRD skill docs.
The probe passes only when .oh/tasks/<feature-name>/prd.md is present.
The probe resolves the repo root from ${BASH_SOURCE[0]}.

userStories.title: Record the change for review
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want task and changelog artifacts that explain why the path contract changed.
acceptanceCriteria: /eval runs without a new green-to-red regression before the PR is marked ready.
userStories.notes: Full eval gate ran successfully (55 probes before addition plus new probe; exit 0).
